{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231442160C875526CB5C321734CD"}"},"total":5523},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523243579643708184","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事流程，逻辑严谨，节奏紧凑，战斗体系完整没有崩坏。基本兼顾了个人实力，建立的势力实力以及后宫的实力，一口气看到最后，没有什么大毒点，正在等待更新。再末世文中，品质优良。
每个地图都有一定数量红颜知己，基本每个人都有自己的故事，这点处理的不错。早期的后宫除了个别有特色的以外都已经工具化，很少提起。
故事大纲：主角江凡，普通快递员，重生到红雾灾难前几天并觉醒系统，他的女人消耗资源数倍返还，同时主角获得无限空间仓库。
主角从地球起步，苟活求生，收服后宫，强化自身，发展势力，发掘末日真相。从末日地球到修真星球再到宇宙万界。
主角行事势弱时懂得隐忍，强大时嚣张霸道，独裁暴力，对待女性并不友好，更偏向利益收买和暴力胁迫（有分辨忠诚度的能力），对于不忠和带恶意的人绝不手软，从不相信感情。
主角后宫（有名字的）20余人，后为刷资源供养帝国通过选秀后宫扩大到550+。后面那些都是没有名字的工具人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751650988,"group_id":"7366863411273010200","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6pqqYgPx9dATSsm5YZktY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4cd450baa3da48328adbcc3818adf62e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789107&x-signature=NllDCeYDLuenIUZjYuECJd6jsTw%3D","user_id":"220332357085053","user_name":"十年一度的淳常在"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"220332357085053","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366863411273010200","book_info":{"abstract":"末世降临，物资匮乏，别人艰难求生，江凡却跟美女们一起享受生活，因为她们消耗的物资直接返还！

or_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7378474121620603710","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常合我的口味，书里的观点很真实也很现实，主角冷血无情，自私自利，绝对利己，自身利益至上，收留的女人都是工具人，杀人绝对不多哔哔一句话。有些读者会觉得太没有人性太黑暗，但是我觉得实在泰裤辣"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717937298,"group_id":"7366863411273010200","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"残夜月下孤影","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Qxxodp9TqUoMNbd63QKtLzacSAl7PDciQkQLcjkp33","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8b1572a236064b6b80795e3002b8b1df~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789267&x-signature=XC4LcxmD9Q%2BnyI9uqDI3np10Gok%3D","user_id":"1064756778637436","user_name":"只愿再无来生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1064756778637436","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1665924375,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366863411273010200","book_info":{"abstract":"末世降临，物资匮乏，别人艰难求生，江凡却跟美女们一起享受生活，因为她们消耗的物资直接返还！

tick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7473146454842721048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部末世结合修仙，其实看起来也是很不错，很多书友，看到末世变成修仙就直接弃书了，纷纷给了差评，其实不然，作者构思缜密，追根刨底，早在最开始就埋下了伏笔，只是很多书友看过类似的小说，当成了同一种，加入了修仙，就扛不住心里的落差，很多人看爽文，都是不带脑子，直接爽就完事了，其实根本不考虑爽文背后的逻辑，作者在对于一切未知，找寻真理，非常耐人寻味，这也算是末世文一种新的开端，末世结合修仙，真的超好看！！！！一定要仔仔细细，认认真真，潦草带过的话，容易跟不上剧情！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739980773,"group_id":"7366863411273010200","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我这遭逼的屌丝的生活","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4qsDPVLkVW3WjR69aTHVF8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a8275fa5d41d43bc89b3b426c314789e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794721&x-signature=hogiMcQtJyiHI2UoqNWgv3ERZv4%3D","user_id":"91677691116","user_name":"星辰i大海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"91677691116","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1737911866,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7366863411273010200","book_info":{"abstract":"末世降临，物资匮乏，别人艰难求生，江凡却跟美女们一起享受生活，因为她们消耗的物资直接返还！
